productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Printed White and Navy Blue Kurta
description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of   "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition White kurta with herringbone print in navy blue, made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a slit neck, herringbone printed yoke, three quarter sleeves with printed tape at the cuffs, and printed tape along the vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The yoke with the mix-and-match herringbone print adds zing to the garment. Team it with jeans or leggings, a colourful wooden bangle and flats. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
